rationale: Ground truth here is essentially empty (two LGTMs and a manual verification comment, no inline concerns), so recall is trivially satisfied by both. X's single finding (missing positive unit test for layers=2) is valid, grounded, and actionable but minor. Y additionally traces the shared-constant change to two out-of-diff reliability test files still hardcoding the old '3' bound, giving exact file/line locations, code snippets, and concrete fixes for a real functional break the PR author and human reviewers missed — higher-impact, well-evidenced, and more actionable than X's coverage nit.
